commands.review_summary:
The PR updates six direct Go dependencies in `go.mod` and refreshes related `go.sum` checksums and transitive module requirements.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is dependency maintenance rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant check is upgrade/runtime validation, not reproducing a failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor runtime proof plus dependency-owner compatibility review.

target.title: chore(deps): update direct dependencies
target.body:
## Summary

Bumps all outdated direct module dependencies to their latest versions:

| Module | From | To |
| --- | --- | --- |
| github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go | v0.54.1 | v0.55.0 |
| golang.org/x/net | v0.53.0 | v0.56.0 |
| golang.org/x/sys | v0.43.0 | v0.46.0 |
| golang.org/x/term | v0.42.0 | v0.44.0 |
| golang.org/x/text | v0.36.0 | v0.38.0 |
| google.golang.org/api | v0.277.0 | v0.285.0 |

`go mod tidy` also refreshed the corresponding transitive dependencies (crypto, sync, grpc, genproto, enterprise-certificate-proxy).

## Verification

- `go build ./...` — passes
- `go vet ./...` — passes
- `go test ./...` — passes
- `gofmt -l .` — clean

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
